testcase.name: test_payment_gateway_timeout
testcase.failure:
TimeoutError: Payment gateway did not respond within 5 seconds

testcase.failure:

Traceback (most recent call last): File "tests/api/test_products.py", line 123, in test_product_price_calculation assert product.price == 99.99 AssertionError: Expected price 99.99, got 100.00
